lines.text: Hi, my name is Sarah Chen. I'm calling about my March invoice — I was charged twice for the premium plan.
I'm sorry to hear that, Sarah. Can you give me your order number?
It's ORD-4521. This is really frustrating, I've been a customer for two years and this is the second time this has happened.
I understand your frustration. Let me look into order ORD-4521. I can see the duplicate charge. I'm going to escalate this to our billing team and they'll process a refund within 48 hours.
Okay, thank you. Please make sure someone actually follows up this time.
Absolutely, Sarah. I've noted that follow-up is important to you. You'll hear from us within 48 hours. Is there anything else I can help with?
